summary: Verified new 'Create Print Request from Customer Branding' wiring — full backend + frontend integration. Backend: added test_print_request_create_from_branding.py covering final-approved gating (400), zero/negative qty (400), invalid due date (400) and persistence of total_monthly_volume/starting_monthly_volume/initial_order_quantity/requested_due_date/notes. Frontend: exercised the entire flow end-to-end on Lead detail page (Drive Folder Test Lead, uuid 08c93122-99fc-4587-b31c-559649f29c17) — Customer Branding card renders, design requests list renders, Print Request button is visible ONLY on final-approved rows and absent on submitted rows, dialog opens with pre-filled Total Monthly Volume from the lead's current_volume, submit created PR-2026-0006 with a success toast.

minor.issue: Lead pydantic model requires current_volume to be a string; setting a numeric value in DB triggers a 500 ValidationError. Not caused by this iteration but worth type-coercing on read to prevent brittle failures.

action_items: Optional: harden Lead read endpoint to coerce current_volume to string (or make schema more permissive) so bad DB data doesn't blow up the Lead Detail page.
critical_code_review_comments: print_requests.py create endpoint correctly guards on FINAL_APPROVED_STATES, validates order_qty>0 and ISO date, and captures all new volume/quantity fields — good.
CreatePrintRequestDialog imports DatePicker as a named export which matches ui/date-picker.jsx (named export confirmed).
LeadBottleDesigns wires visibility with FINAL_APPROVED_STATES.has(r.current_state_key) — matches backend.

Consider making initial_order_quantity a required field in PrintRequestCreate (currently Optional=None with fallback to quantity). Frontend enforces >0 client-side but a Pydantic field-level validator would be safer.

success_rate.backend: 100% (5 passed, 1 skipped due to seed data; all 18 existing module tests still pass)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (button visibility, dialog open, prefill, submit → toast all verified)

seed_data_creation: Temporarily linked design request 5be2c9a1-b940-4d8e-8044-faa7299d5906 (state final_approved) to lead 08c93122-99fc-4587-b31c-559649f29c17 (Drive Folder Test Lead) and set lead.current_volume='8000' to exercise the frontend flow. Both fields were REVERTED (unset) after the test. All TEST_ prefixed print requests deleted from DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Nyla-air-water seed data has very few final-approved design requests, none originally tied to a lead. For future frontend testing of this flow you may need to link a final_approved design_requests_new doc to a lead via mongosh (as done here) and revert afterwards. Lead pydantic model treats current_volume as str, so any numeric override in DB will 500 the /leads/{id} endpoint — use '8000' (string) not 8000.
rca of the issue: N/A — no unresolved issues. Both new-feature wiring and validation flow work correctly.
